headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Maintains Overweight on Elevance Health, Raises Price Target to $450
summary: Cantor Fitzgerald  analyst Sarah James   maintains Elevance Health (NYSE:ELV) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $400 to $450.
